title: Spection
description: A pack focused on lengthening the progression along while encouraging more exploration and careful thinking about encounters.
body:
# What is Spection? 
Spection is a pack designed with a focus on exploration, adventure, and survival. Though these focuses do not come without thought and consideration for the base game, as many quality of life improvements and adjustments have been made to the base game to create an overall smoother experience and blend with modded content. While there are new additions to redstone, the pack is not focused on tech or magic, so those of you looking for something like _Create_ will not find that here.

## Exploration and Adventure
Exploration in this pack of course comes from the suite of new biomes and structures but it is also blended with new progression. _Deeper Caves_ adds Rose Gold, a set of gear that falls between Iron and Diamond, adding length to the midgame. There are also a host of new types of equipment from _Relics_, _Quivers_, _AstikorCarts Redux_, _Artifacts_, and more that further encourage exploratin and gathering of resources. Exploration will take a bit more thought, as _Thirst Was Taken_ and _Cold Sweat_ add both Thirst and Temperature respectively, creating new and engaging hazards and obstacles that players will need to think about when traversing the new environments and structures. Fear not though, as both mods do a fantastic job with integrating with other modded content, creating a seamless experience. 

## Survival
While _Thirst Was Taken_ and _Cold Sweat_ will be the most immedietely obvious survival mechanics, there are several others that will add new depth to your day to day gameplay. The two that can be the most impactful are _Second Chance_ and _Wall-Jump TXF_. Second Chance will allow you some more grace from being one shot if you have over 7 hearts, now being able to survive with just half a heart to try and make a quick recovery, while also giving you a split second to jump in the hair if you fall off a ledge. Wall Jump allows you to jump up walls up to five times (configurable) to mitigate the habit of creating towers of dirt just to get up a couple blocks. In addition to these mods is _Cardiac_, a small mod that greatly helps the general balance of the pack. This small mod causes defeated mobs to drop life orbs that you can collect to regain some help. This combined with Second Chance makes combat more forgiving, especially since there are some powerful mob additions to the world. 

## Mobs and Bosses
There are a suite of new mobs and bosses that will create new incentives and goals to try and accomplish. Many of the mobs also integrate wonderfully with the biome mods used here _Oh The Biomes We've Gone_ for the surface/nether, and _Regions Unexplored_ for the caves/nether. _Alex's Mobs_ has been added to the pack to help add life and diversity to the world, along with unique challenges. This has been paired with _Bosses'Rise_, _Creeper Overhaul_, _Endermen Overhaul_, _Friends&Foes_, _LEnder's Cataclysm_, _More Critters_, _Opposing Force_, _Ribbits_, _Rotten Creatures_, _Sons of Sins_, and _Variants&Ventures_. All of which creating an extremely dynamic pool of mobs and encounters. 

## Multiplayer
Multiplayer is an extremely important part of gaming, bringing people together and this pack aims to add experiences and interactions unique to the multiplayer experience. Mods like Chat Heads and Longer Chat History bring fantastic quality of life to chatting. Simple Voice Chat adds a simple proximity voice chat to add an extra level immersion for players looking for it. Essential has also been included to allow for an easier co op experience. Ping Wheel has been added to allow players to mark locations or entities, even across vast distances.  

## Miscellaneous Mechanics
Combat has been overhaul with the popular _Better Combat_ mod, but it has also seen the addition of _Warrior Rage_, a mod that adds kill streaks to the game, granting damage bonuses for quick, consecutive mob kills. The Nether sees additional biome diversity through _Amplified Nether_ and _Gardens of the Dead_. The End sees the same with _BetterEnd_, _The Endergetic Expansion_, _YUNG's Better End Island_, and an overhauled Ender Dragon fight. _Carry On_ along with Carry On Extend has been added to not only allow you to pick up entities but to throw them as well.

There is much more that has not been mentioned here but it all contributes to the main goal of creating a more dynamic exploration and survival experience that can be enjoyed with friends or solo.
